title: Biostatistician I
description: ICON is a global clinical research organization running Phase I-IV trials across every therapeutic area. As a Biostatistician, you'll analyze complex datasets from global clinical trials.
responsibilities: Design statistical analysis plans for clinical trials
Analyze clinical trial data using SAS or R
Prepare statistical tables and figures for regulatory submissions
Support interim analyses and safety reviews

requirements.education: Master's degree in Biostatistics, Statistics, or related field
requirements.experience_years: 2-4 years of biostatistics or clinical statistics experience

benefits: Professional development and continuing education support
Employee assistance program (EAP) with mental health services
